notes: This edition integrates the core ten-year plan with missing works from the 1952 and 1990 Great Books lists.
Readings are ordered for first-pass intelligibility while preserving the broad historical arc.
Selections are kept concise and practical rather than tied to a specific volume pagination.

works.title: Lives
works.selection: Lycurgus; Numa Pompilius; Lycurgus and Numa Compared; Alexander; Caesar

works.title: The Gospel According to Saint Matthew
Essays
works.selection: Of Custom; Of Pedantry; Of the Education of Children; That It Is Folly to Measure Truth and Error by Our Own Capacity; Of Cannibals; That the Relish of Good and Evil Depends in Great Measure upon the Opinion We Have of Them; Upon Some Verses of Virgil

works.title: Democracy in America
works.selection: Introduction; Vol. I, Part 1, ch. 1-8; Vol. II, Part 2, ch. 1-5

works.title: The Theory of the Leisure Class
